indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and positioning during yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: Soft seating
indicators.rationale: The soft seating provides comfort and support for extended periods of sitting during yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can enhance the mood and focus during yoga and stretching sessions.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga and stretching due to its large open space, comfortable seating, and natural lighting.
